name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
-----------------------------------------------

## Goal

What do you want to achieve?

## Current limitation

What doesn’t work well today?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Example (optional but helpful)

**Input**
Paste a sample text.

**Expected output**
Show how the result should look.

## Mode (if relevant)

Minimal / Balanced / Aggressive

## Model used (if relevant)

Claude / Gemini / Kimi / Other

## Why it matters

How will this improve results or usability?

## Additional context

(Optional)
